creator: prj@rootwyrm.com
text:
Patch fails installation testing; it's not installing Radarr.exe at all where expected.

 find /usr/local/share -name *.exe
/usr/local/share/sonarr/NzbDrone.Update/NzbDrone.Update.exe
/usr/local/share/sonarr/NzbDrone.exe
/usr/local/share/radarr/7za.exe
/usr/local/share/radarr/vswhere.exe
/usr/local/share/radarr/setup/inno/ISCC.exe
/usr/local/share/radarr/tools/nuget/nuget.exe
/usr/local/share/radarr/tools/pdb2mdb/pdb2mdb.exe

Nope. No /usr/local/share/radarr/Radarr.exe as called by the rc.d script. 

 root@stonespire /opt/talecaster/radarr # pkg info radarr
radarr-0.2.0.1293
Name           : radarr
Version        : 0.2.0.1293
Installed on   : Fri Feb 15 00:44:45 2019 EST
Origin         : net-p2p/radarr
Architecture   : FreeBSD:11:*
Prefix         : /usr/local
Categories     : net-p2p
Licenses       : GPLv3
Maintainer     : feld@FreeBSD.org
WWW            : https://radarr.video
Comment        : Movie Library Manager for Usenet and BitTorrent users
Options        :
        X11            : off
Annotations    :
        repo_type      : binary
        repository     : talecaster_dnpkg.rootwyrm.com
Flat size      : 44.9MiB
Description    :
Radarr is a fork of Sonarr to work with movies à la Couchpotato.

WWW: https://radarr.video

12:49 AM Fri Feb 15 [J:0 C:40 H:539] FreeBSD 11.2
 root@stonespire /opt/talecaster/radarr # pkg info -l radarr|grep Radarr.exe

12:49 AM Fri Feb 15 [J:0 C:41 H:540] FreeBSD 11.2
 root@stonespire /opt/talecaster/radarr #
